summary: Patient-profile clarity improvements and saved-view reliability fixes.

updates.title: Support Programs in Patient Header
updates.body: The patient profile header now shows a patient's active support programs as chips, with quick access to program details.

updates.title: Status History Timestamps
updates.body: Status history now shows the time of day for each status, and a patient's latest status is determined by the actual status date.

updates.title: Default Newest-First Sorting
updates.body: Status History and Shipments & Infusions now default to most-recent-first.

updates.title: Saved Views Retained
updates.body: Saved-view filters and column order now persist when navigating back or editing records across patient and CRM list views.

updates.title: Inquiry Notifications
updates.body: Users without Patient Tracking access can now open an inquiry from its notification without hitting an error.

updates.title: Patient Update Stability
updates.body: Resolved an error when updating a patient record that has no date of birth.
